notes_on_flags.HAS_PERFORMANCE_CODE: FALSE — one-shot scaffolder CLI; file I/O + 2 network fetches, no hot paths/caching/concurrency. qe-performance-tester (load/stress) N/A.
notes_on_flags.HAS_CRITICAL_CODE: TRUE — product's safety-critical surface is its governance/provenance code (witness, mcp-scan HIGH rules, secret redaction, injection-safe renderer); justified qe-mutation-tester for test-effectiveness.
notes_on_flags.HAS_AUTHORIZATION: TRUE — federate trust-tiers + MCP default-deny policy; mapped qe-sod-analyzer is SAP-GRC-specific and N/A, so the authorization surface was folded into qe-security-scanner.

gate_driver: Two HIGH security findings in provenance/secret-handling code (witness no-op verifier; secret leak into 'sanitised' bundles). Step 5 HOLD rule: any HIGH/CRITICAL in security code forces HOLD.
supersedes: Earlier 3-dimension qcsd-development-review workflow pass (docs/metaharness/01-quality-analysis.md) rated the generator 'SHIP-grade'; it never ran security, mutation, or defect analysis.

high_findings.title: Witness verification is a guaranteed no-op (security theater)
secrets fetch leaks raw secret to stdout; bundle redaction is key-name-based not value-based

process_findings: CI coverage understates truth by ~27 pts: tests import compiled dist/*.js via file:// so v8 attributes execution to excluded dist/ files; add a dist->src resolve alias.
coverage.reportOnFailure=false while 3 repo-hygiene tests fail => CI silently produces no coverage report.
secrets tests contain environment-gated escape hatches that no-op when gcloud is absent (CI), giving illusory DI coverage.
No red-green-refactor evidence (0 TDD commits; 16/16 modules add src+test in same commit).
aqe_tooling_caveats_carried_over: Target repo != CWD: agents were given absolute paths and an explicit warning to inspect BOTH co-located and root __tests__; the prior qcsd-development-review run mis-targeted CWD and missed the co-located suite.
